project_type: Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript, framer-motion animations
verification_instructions: Run npm run build and npm run lint in frontend directory. Both must pass with zero errors.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && pnpm install (already done, node_modules present)
environment_constraints: Open internet. node_modules already installed. No Docker needed for frontend-only changes.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing matte dark theme (--bg, --surface, --border CSS vars). No glowy gradients on new UI. accent-500 indigo for accent color. DO NOT MODIFY: hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, Providers.tsx, components/entity/, shared/
key_patterns: Components use framer-motion for animations, lucide-react for icons, CSS variables for theming (--bg=#0f0f10, --surface=#18181b, --border, --text-primary/secondary/tertiary). Tailwind utility classes with custom config. State persisted in localStorage. Dashboard layout renders a persistent AI FAB button + AIChatPanel. TopBar is in AppShell. VoiceMode is rendered inside ChatExperience.
directory_structure: frontend/app/ (Next.js App Router pages), frontend/components/ (shared components organized by domain: chat/, voice/, ai/, layout/, ui/), frontend/lib/ (API helpers, utilities), frontend/hooks/ (custom hooks like useChatSocket)
